672 /* the receiver builds the map used for distribution */

◆ distribute()

int distribute ( void  )

Definition at line 58 of file distribute.c.

59{
60 /* Distributes products from fft-space to sub-volumes */
61
62 int my_fft_box[6],my_subbox[6];
63 int log_ntask, bit, receiver, sender;
64
65 /* this defines the box that the task possesses in the FFT space */
66 my_fft_box[0] = MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_];
67 my_fft_box[1] = MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_];
68 my_fft_box[2] = MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_];
69 my_fft_box[3] = MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_];
70 my_fft_box[4] = MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_];
71 my_fft_box[5] = MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_];
72
73 /* this defines the box that the task possesses in the subbox space
74 (the starting coordinate may be negative) */
75 my_subbox[0] = subbox.stabl[_x_];
76 my_subbox[1] = subbox.stabl[_y_];
77 my_subbox[2] = subbox.stabl[_z_];
78 my_subbox[3] = subbox.Lgwbl[_x_];
79 my_subbox[4] = subbox.Lgwbl[_y_];
80 my_subbox[5] = subbox.Lgwbl[_z_];
81
82#ifdef DEBUG
83 char fname[SBLENGTH];
84 sprintf(fname,"Task%d.dbg",ThisTask);
85 DBGFD = fopen(fname,"a");
86#endif
87
88 /* let's synchronize the tasks here */
89 fflush(stdout);
90 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
91
92 /* these are the already stored particles */
93#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
94 frag_offset=subbox.Nneeded;
95#endif
96
97 /* stores the data relative to the intersection of the fft box and subbox */
98 if (keep_data(my_fft_box, my_subbox))
99 return 1;
100
101 comm_buffer=(product_data*)calloc(BUFLEN , sizeof(product_data));
102 if (comm_buffer==0x0)
103 {
104 printf("ERROR on task %d: could not allocate comm_buffer in distribute\n",ThisTask);
105 fflush (stdout);
106 return 1;
107 }
108
109 /* hypercubic communication scheme */
110 for (log_ntask=0; log_ntask<1000; log_ntask++)
111 if (1<<log_ntask >= NTasks)
112 break;
113
114 /* loop on hypercube dimension */
115 for (bit=1; bit<1<<log_ntask; bit++)
116 {
117 /* loop on tasks */
118 for (sender=0; sender<NTasks; sender++)
119 {
120 /* receiver task is computed with a bitwise xor */
121 receiver = sender ^ bit;
122
123 /* condition on sender and receiver */
124 if (receiver < NTasks && sender < receiver)
125 {
126
127 /* the communication will be done
128 first sender -> receiver and then receiver -> sender */
129
130 if (ThisTask==sender)
131 send_data(my_fft_box, receiver);
132 else if (ThisTask==receiver)
133 {
134 if (recv_data(my_subbox, sender))
135 return 1;
136 }
137
138 if (ThisTask==receiver)
139 send_data(my_fft_box, sender);
140 else if (ThisTask==sender)
141 {
142 if (recv_data(my_subbox, receiver))
143 return 1;
144 }
145
146 }
147 }
148 }
149
150
151 /* updates the number of stored particles */
152#ifdef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
153 subbox.Nstored=subbox.Npart;
154#else
155
156 if (frag_offset > subbox.Nalloc)
157 subbox.Nstored=subbox.Nalloc;
158 else
159 subbox.Nstored=frag_offset;
160
161 subbox.Nneeded=frag_offset;
162
163#endif
164
165 free(comm_buffer);
166
167 fflush(stdout);
168 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
169
170#ifdef DEBUG
171 fclose(DBGFD);
172#endif
173
174 return 0;
175}
comm_buffer

719{
720 /* Distributes accretion times from sub-volumes to fft-space */
721
722 int my_fft_box[6];
723 int log_ntask, bit, receiver, sender;
724
725 /* this defines the box that the task possesses in the FFT space */
726 my_fft_box[0] = MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_];
727 my_fft_box[1] = MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_];
728 my_fft_box[2] = MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_];
729 my_fft_box[3] = MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_];
730 my_fft_box[4] = MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_];
731 my_fft_box[5] = MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_];
732
733 /* let's synchronize the tasks here */
734 fflush(stdout);
735 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
736
737 /* stores the data relative to the intersection of the fft box and subbox */
738 if (keep_data_back(my_fft_box))
739 return 1;
740
741 back_buffer=(back_data*)calloc(BUFLEN , sizeof(back_data));
742 if (back_buffer==0x0)
743 {
744 printf("ERROR on task %d: could not allocate back_buffer in distribute_back\n",ThisTask);
745 fflush (stdout);
746 return 1;
747 }
748
749 /* hypercubic communication scheme */
750 for (log_ntask=0; log_ntask<1000; log_ntask++)
751 if (1<<log_ntask >= NTasks)
752 break;
753
754 /* loop on hypercube dimension */
755 for (bit=1; bit<1<<log_ntask; bit++)
756 {
757 /* loop on tasks */
758 for (sender=0; sender<NTasks; sender++)
759 {
760 /* receiver task is computed with a bitwise xor */
761 receiver = sender ^ bit;
762
763 /* condition on sender and receiver */
764 if (receiver < NTasks && sender < receiver)
765 {
766
767 /* the communication will be done
768 first sender -> receiver and then receiver -> sender */
769
770 if (ThisTask==sender)
771 send_data_back(receiver);
772 else if (ThisTask==receiver)
773 {
774 if (recv_data_back(my_fft_box, sender))
775 return 1;
776 }
777
778 if (ThisTask==receiver)
779 send_data_back(sender);
780 else if (ThisTask==sender)
781 {
782 if (recv_data_back(my_fft_box, receiver))
783 return 1;
784 }
785
786 }
787 }
788 }
789
790
791 free(back_buffer);
792
793 fflush(stdout);
794 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
795
796 return 0;
797}

◆ fft_space_index()

unsigned int fft_space_index ( unsigned int  pos,
int *  box 
)

Definition at line 603 of file distribute.c.

604{
605 /* here we move:
606 (1) from index i to the relative position of the point in intersection,
607 (2) from that to global position without PBCs,
608 (3) then we impose PBCs
609 (4) then we compute the position in the local FFT box
610 (5) and finally we compute the local particle index
611 (these are the logical steps, formulas are more compact)
612 */
613
614 unsigned int ip, jp, kp;
615
616 INDEX_TO_COORD(pos, ip, jp, kp, (box+3));
617
618 return
619 COORD_TO_INDEX((ip + box[0]) % MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_] - MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_],
620 (jp + box[1]) % MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_] - MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_],
621 (kp + box[2]) % MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_] - MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_],
622 MyGrids[0].GSlocal);
623
624}
INDEX_TO_COORD
#define INDEX_TO_COORD(I, X, Y, Z, L)

COORD_TO_INDEX

650{
651 /* this operates on the map allocated for the distribution */
652 /* gets the bit corresponding to position pos */
653 unsigned int rem = pos%UINTLEN;
654 return (map[pos/UINTLEN] & (1<<rem))>>rem;
655}

◆ intersection()

int intersection ( int *  fbox,
int *  sbox,
int *  ibox 
)

Definition at line 178 of file distribute.c.

179{
180
181 unsigned int istart[3], istop[3], istart2[3], istop2[3], dim, Nint,
182 stop1, stop2, this, off;
183 unsigned int ISTARTx, ISTOPx, ISTARTy, ISTOPy, ISTARTz, ISTOPz, ax, ay, az;
184
185 /* intersection of the two boxes is considered dimension by dimension */
186 Nint=1;
187 for (dim=0; dim<3; dim++)
188 {
189 /* in case, fix negative starting point */
190 if (sbox[dim]<0)
191 sbox[dim]+=MyGrids[0].GSglobal[dim];
192
193 /* first stopping point for subbox is at most the global box edge */
194 stop1=fbox[dim]+fbox[dim+3];
195 if (sbox[dim]+sbox[dim+3] > MyGrids[0].GSglobal[dim])
196 stop2=MyGrids[0].GSglobal[dim];
197 else
198 stop2=sbox[dim]+sbox[dim+3];
199
200 /* intersection up to the global box edge */
201 istart[dim] = ( fbox[dim] > sbox[dim] ? fbox[dim] : sbox[dim] );
202 istop[dim] = ( stop1 < stop2 ? stop1 : stop2 );
203
204 /* if the subbox goes beyond the global box edge,
205 apply PBCs to the other segment and check the intersection */
206 if ( (stop2=sbox[dim]+sbox[dim+3]) > MyGrids[0].GSglobal[dim] )
207 {
208 stop2 = stop2%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[dim];
209 istart2[dim] = ( fbox[dim] > 0 ? fbox[dim] : 0);
210 istop2[dim] = ( stop1 < stop2 ? stop1 : stop2 );
211 }
212 else
213 {
214 istart2[dim]=1;
215 istop2[dim]=0;
216 }
217
218 /* this dimension contributes 0, 1 or 2 */
219 Nint *= (istart[dim] < istop[dim]) + (istart2[dim] < istop2[dim]);
220 }
221
222 /* store all intersections, looping on the two options for each dimension */
223 if (Nint)
224 {
225 this=0;
226 for (ax=0; ax<2; ax++)
227 {
228 if (ax)
229 {
230 ISTARTx=istart[0];
231 ISTOPx=istop[0];
232 }
233 else
234 {
235 ISTARTx=istart2[0];
236 ISTOPx=istop2[0];
237 }
238 for (ay=0; ay<2; ay++)
239 {
240 if (ay)
241 {
242 ISTARTy=istart[1];
243 ISTOPy=istop[1];
244 }
245 else
246 {
247 ISTARTy=istart2[1];
248 ISTOPy=istop2[1];
249 }
250 for (az=0; az<2; az++)
251 {
252 if (az)
253 {
254 ISTARTz=istart[2];
255 ISTOPz=istop[2];
256 }
257 else
258 {
259 ISTARTz=istart2[2];
260 ISTOPz=istop2[2];
261 }
262
263 if ( (ISTARTx<ISTOPx) & (ISTARTy<ISTOPy) & (ISTARTz<ISTOPz) )
264 {
265 off=this*6;
266 ibox[ off]=ISTARTx;
267 ibox[1+off]=ISTARTy;
268 ibox[2+off]=ISTARTz;
269 ibox[3+off]=ISTOPx-ISTARTx;
270 ibox[4+off]=ISTOPy-ISTARTy;
271 ibox[5+off]=ISTOPz-ISTARTz;
272 this++;
273 }
274 }
275 }
276 }
277 }
278
279
280#ifdef DEBUG
281 fprintf(DBGFD,"INTERSECTION\n");
282 fprintf(DBGFD,"Task %d, fft box: %d %d %d %d %d %d\n",
283 ThisTask,fbox[0],fbox[1],fbox[2],fbox[3],fbox[4],fbox[5]);
284 fprintf(DBGFD," subvolume: %d %d %d %d %d %d\n",
285 sbox[0],sbox[1],sbox[2],sbox[3],sbox[4],sbox[5]);
286 for (this=0; this<Nint; this++)
287 {
288 off=this*6;
289 fprintf(DBGFD," intersection %d: %d %d %d %d %d %d\n",
290 this,ibox[off],ibox[1+off],ibox[2+off],ibox[3+off],ibox[4+off],ibox[5+off]);
291 }
292 if (!Nint)
293 fprintf(DBGFD," no intersections\n");
294#endif
295
296 return Nint;
297}

◆ keep_data()

int keep_data ( int *  fft_box,
int *  sub_box 
)

Definition at line 547 of file distribute.c.

548{
549 /* this routine transfers products from the fft space to the subbox space */
550
551#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
552 unsigned int *map, mapl;
553#endif
554 int interbox[48], i, Nint, box, off;
555 unsigned int size;
556
557 Nint = intersection(fft_box, sub_box, interbox);
558 for (box=0; box<Nint; box++)
559 {
560 off=box*6;
561 size = interbox[3+off] * interbox[4+off] * interbox[5+off];
562
563#ifdef DEBUG
564 fprintf(DBGFD,"Task %d will keep this box: %d %d %d -- %d %d %d\n",
565 ThisTask, interbox[0+off],interbox[1+off],interbox[2+off],interbox[3+off],interbox[4+off],interbox[5+off]);
566#endif
567
568#ifdef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
569 /* copy data */
570 for (i=0; i<size; i++)
571 memcpy(&frag[subbox_space_index(i,interbox+off)],
572 &products[fft_space_index(i, interbox+off)],sizeof(product_data));
573#else
574
575 /* map of needed particles */
576 mapl = size/8 + 1;
577 map = (unsigned int*)calloc(mapl, sizeof(unsigned int));
578 build_distmap(map, interbox+off);
579 update_distmap(map, interbox+off);
580
581 /* copy data */
582 for (i=0; i<size; i++)
583 {
584 if (get_distmap_bit(map, i))
585 {
586 if (frag_offset<subbox.Nalloc)
587 {
588 frag_pos[frag_offset]=subbox_space_index(i,interbox+off);
589 memcpy(&frag[frag_offset],
590 &products[fft_space_index(i, interbox+off)], sizeof(product_data));
591 }
592 ++frag_offset;
593 }
594 }
595 free(map);
596#endif
597 }
598
599 return 0;
600}

◆ keep_data_back()

int keep_data_back ( int *  fft_box)

Definition at line 799 of file distribute.c.

800{
801 /* this routine transfers products from the fft space to the subbox space */
802
803 unsigned int ibox, jbox, kbox, good_particle, fftpos;
804
805 /* find particles that are wanted by the receiver */
806 for (int iz=0; iz<subbox.Nstored; iz++)
807 {
808#ifdef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
809 INDEX_TO_COORD(iz,ibox,jbox,kbox,subbox.Lgwbl);
810#else
811 INDEX_TO_COORD(frag_pos[iz],ibox,jbox,kbox,subbox.Lgwbl);
812#endif
813
814 /* this is still in the subbox frame */
815 good_particle = ( ibox>=subbox.safe[_x_] && ibox<subbox.Lgwbl[_x_]-subbox.safe[_x_] &&
816 jbox>=subbox.safe[_y_] && jbox<subbox.Lgwbl[_y_]-subbox.safe[_y_] &&
817 kbox>=subbox.safe[_z_] && kbox<subbox.Lgwbl[_z_]-subbox.safe[_z_] );
818
819 /* global box frame */
820 ibox = (ibox + subbox.stabl[_x_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_];
821 jbox = (jbox + subbox.stabl[_y_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_];
822 kbox = (kbox + subbox.stabl[_z_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_];
823
824 if (good_particle &&
825 ibox >= fft_box[0] && ibox < fft_box[0]+fft_box[3] &&
826 jbox >= fft_box[1] && jbox < fft_box[1]+fft_box[4] &&
827 kbox >= fft_box[2] && kbox < fft_box[2]+fft_box[5])
828 {
829 /* position in the fft domain */
830 fftpos = COORD_TO_INDEX(ibox - fft_box[0], jbox - fft_box[1], kbox - fft_box[2], (fft_box+3));
831 products[fftpos].zacc = frag[iz].zacc;
832 products[fftpos].group_ID = frag[iz].group_ID;
833 }
834 }
835
836 return 0;
837}

◆ recv_data()

int recv_data ( int *  mybox,
int  sender 
)

Definition at line 419 of file distribute.c.

420{
421 /* This routine receives the content of a box from a sender task.
422 Communication is divided in these stages:
423 1) the target receives the start and length of sender box,
424 2) the target sends the start and the length of its box,
425 3) intersection of the sender and target boxes is computed
426 4) if there is an intersection the target sends a map of needed particles
427 5) the target loops on particles and receives them in chunks of size BUFLEN
428 */
429
430#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
431 unsigned int *map, mapl;
432 int nstore;
433#endif
434 unsigned int size, nsent, boff, expected, received;
435 int senderbox[6], interbox[48], i, Nint, box;
436 MPI_Status status;
437
438 MPI_Recv(senderbox, 6, MPI_INT, sender, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
439 MPI_Send(mybox , 6, MPI_INT, sender, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
440
441 /* up to 8 intersections of the two boxes */
442 Nint=intersection(senderbox, mybox, interbox);
443 for (box=0; box<Nint; box++)
444 {
445 boff=box*6;
446 size = interbox[3+boff] * interbox[4+boff] * interbox[5+boff];
447
448#ifdef DEBUG
449 fprintf(DBGFD,"Task %d will receive this box: %d %d %d -- %d %d %d\n",
450 ThisTask, interbox[0+boff],interbox[1+boff],interbox[2+boff],
451 interbox[3+boff],interbox[4+boff],interbox[5+boff]);
452#endif
453
454#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
455 /* send the map of needed particles */
456 mapl = size/8 + 1;
457 map = (unsigned int*)calloc(mapl, sizeof(unsigned int));
458
459 /* constructs the map for the intersection and send it to the sender */
460 build_distmap(map, interbox+boff);
461 MPI_Send(map, mapl, MPI_INT, sender, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
462
463 /* map is nulled before getting it back */
464 memset(map, 0, mapl * sizeof(unsigned int));
465
466 /* the map is updated by the sender and sent back */
467 MPI_Recv(map, mapl, MPI_INT, sender, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
468
469 /* record positions of particles that will be stored
470 and count how many particles will be sent */
471 int off=frag_offset;
472 int count=frag_offset;
473
474 for (i=0; i<size; i++)
475 if (get_distmap_bit(map, i))
476 {
477 ++count;
478 if (off<subbox.Nalloc)
479 frag_pos[off++]=subbox_space_index(i, interbox+boff);
480 }
481
482 expected = count-frag_offset;
483#else
484 expected=size;
485#endif
486
487 /* receive particles */
488 received=0;
489
490 if (expected)
491 {
492
493 do
494 {
495
496 MPI_Recv(&nsent, 1, MPI_INT, sender, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
497 MPI_Recv(comm_buffer, nsent * sizeof(product_data), MPI_BYTE, sender, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
498#ifdef DEBUG
499 fprintf(DBGFD,"...receiving %d products from Task %d... %d\n",nsent,sender,(int)sizeof(product_data));
500 if (nsent<10)
501 {
502 for (int u=0; u<nsent; u++)
503 fprintf(DBGFD," %f ",comm_buffer[u].Fmax);
504 fprintf(DBGFD,"\n");
505 }
506 else
507 {
508 for (int u=0; u<5; u++)
509 fprintf(DBGFD," %f ",comm_buffer[u].Fmax);
510 fprintf(DBGFD," ... ");
511 for (int u=nsent-5; u<nsent; u++)
512 fprintf(DBGFD," %f ",comm_buffer[u].Fmax);
513 fprintf(DBGFD,"\n");
514 }
515#endif
516
517#ifdef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
518 for (i=0; i<nsent; i++)
519 memcpy(&frag[subbox_space_index(i+received, interbox+boff)],&comm_buffer[i],sizeof(product_data));
520#else
521 if (frag_offset + nsent < subbox.Nalloc)
522 nstore = nsent;
523 else
524 nstore = (long long)subbox.Nalloc - (long long)frag_offset;
525
526 for (i=0; i<nstore; i++)
527 memcpy(&frag[frag_offset + i],&comm_buffer[i],sizeof(product_data));
528 frag_offset+=nsent;
529#endif
530 received+=nsent;
531
532 }
533 while (received<expected);
534
535 }
536
537#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
538 free(map);
539#endif
540 }
541
542 /* done */
543 return 0;
544}
status
MPI_Status status
Definition write_snapshot.c:98

References build_distmap(), comm_buffer, frag, frag_offset, frag_pos, get_distmap_bit(), intersection(), map, subbox_data::Nalloc, status, subbox, subbox_space_index(), and ThisTask.

Referenced by distribute().

Here is the call graph for this function:
Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ recv_data_back()

int recv_data_back ( int *  mybox,
int  sender 
)

Definition at line 911 of file distribute.c.

912{
913 /* This routine receives the content of a box from a sender task.
914 Communication is divided in these stages:
915 1) the target receives the start and length of sender box,
916 2) the target sends the start and the length of its box,
917 3) intersection of the sender and target boxes is computed
918 4) if there is an intersection the target sends a map of needed particles
919 5) the target loops on particles and receives them in chunks of size BUFLEN
920 */
921
922 unsigned int nsent, received;
923 MPI_Status status;
924
925 MPI_Send(mybox, 6, MPI_INT, sender, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
926
927 /* receive particles */
928 received=0;
929
930 do
931 {
932 MPI_Recv(&nsent, 1, MPI_INT, sender, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
933 if (nsent)
934 MPI_Recv(back_buffer, nsent * sizeof(back_data), MPI_BYTE, sender, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
935 for (int iz=0; iz<nsent; iz++)
936 {
937 products[back_buffer[iz].pos].zacc=back_buffer[iz].zacc;
938 products[back_buffer[iz].pos].group_ID=back_buffer[iz].group_ID;
939 }
940 received+=nsent;
941 }
942 while (nsent);
943
944 /* done */
945 return 0;
946}
back_data::zacc
PRODFLOAT zacc
Definition distribute.c:709
back_data::group_ID
int group_ID
Definition distribute.c:710
back_data::pos
unsigned int pos
Definition distribute.c:708

References back_buffer, back_data::group_ID, product_data::group_ID, back_data::pos, products, status, back_data::zacc, and product_data::zacc.

Referenced by distribute_back().

◆ send_data()

int send_data ( int *  mybox,
int  target 
)

Definition at line 300 of file distribute.c.

301{
302 /* This routine sends the content of a box to a target task.
303 Communication is divided in these stages:
304 1) the sender communicates the start and length of its box,
305 2) the sender receives the start and the length of the needed box,
306 3) intersection of the sender and target boxes is computed
307 4) if there is an intersection the sender receives a map of needed particles
308 5) the sender loops on particles and sends them in chunks of size BUFLEN
309 */
310
311#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
312 unsigned int *map, mapl;
313#endif
314 unsigned int size, bufcount;
315 int targetbox[6], interbox[48], i, Nint, box, off;
316 MPI_Status status;
317
318 MPI_Send(mybox , 6, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
319 MPI_Recv(targetbox, 6, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
320
321 /* up to 8 intersections of the two boxes */
322 Nint=intersection(mybox, targetbox, interbox);
323 for (box=0; box<Nint; box++)
324 {
325 off=box*6;
326 size = interbox[3+off] * interbox[4+off] * interbox[5+off];
327
328#ifdef DEBUG
329 fprintf(DBGFD,"Task %d will send this box: %d %d %d -- %d %d %d\n",
330 ThisTask, interbox[0+off],interbox[1+off],interbox[2+off],
331 interbox[3+off],interbox[4+off],interbox[5+off]);
332#endif
333
334#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
335 /* receive the map of needed particles */
336 mapl = size/8 + 1;
337 map = (unsigned int*)calloc(mapl, sizeof(unsigned int));
338
339 /* the receiver has built its map and is sending it */
340 MPI_Recv(map, mapl, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
341
342 /* updates the map and sends it back to the target */
343 update_distmap(map, interbox+off);
344 MPI_Send(map, mapl, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
345#endif
346
347 /* load particles on the buffer and send them to the target */
348 bufcount=0;
349 for (i=0; i<size; i++)
350 {
351#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
352 if (get_distmap_bit(map, i))
353#endif
354 {
355 memcpy(&comm_buffer[bufcount],&products[fft_space_index(i, interbox+off)],sizeof(product_data));
356
357 bufcount++;
358 }
359 if (bufcount==BUFLEN)
360 {
361#ifdef DEBUG
362 fprintf(DBGFD,"...sending %d products to Task %d... %d\n",bufcount,target,(int)sizeof(product_data));
363 if (bufcount<10)
364 {
365 for (int u=0; u<bufcount; u++)
366 fprintf(DBGFD," %f ",comm_buffer[u].Fmax);
367 fprintf(DBGFD,"\n");
368 }
369 else
370 {
371 for (int u=0; u<5; u++)
372 fprintf(DBGFD," %f ",comm_buffer[u].Fmax);
373 fprintf(DBGFD," ... ");
374 for (int u=bufcount-5; u<bufcount; u++)
375 fprintf(DBGFD," %f ",comm_buffer[u].Fmax);
376 fprintf(DBGFD,"\n");
377 }
378#endif
379 MPI_Send(&bufcount, 1, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
380 MPI_Send(comm_buffer, bufcount * sizeof(product_data), MPI_BYTE, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
381 bufcount=0;
382 }
383 }
384
385 if (bufcount)
386 {
387#ifdef DEBUG
388 fprintf(DBGFD,"...sending %d products to Task %d...\n",bufcount,target);
389 if (bufcount<10)
390 {
391 for (int u=0; u<bufcount; u++)
392 fprintf(DBGFD," %f ",comm_buffer[u].Fmax);
393 fprintf(DBGFD,"\n");
394 }
395 else
396 {
397 for (int u=0; u<5; u++)
398 fprintf(DBGFD," %f ",comm_buffer[u].Fmax);
399 fprintf(DBGFD," ... ");
400 for (int u=bufcount-5; u<bufcount; u++)
401 fprintf(DBGFD," %f ",comm_buffer[u].Fmax);
402 fprintf(DBGFD,"\n");
403 }
404#endif
405 MPI_Send(&bufcount, 1, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
406 MPI_Send(comm_buffer, bufcount * sizeof(product_data), MPI_BYTE, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
407 }
408
409#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
410 free(map);
411#endif
412 }
413
414 /* done */
415 return 0;
416}

References BUFLEN, comm_buffer, fft_space_index(), get_distmap_bit(), intersection(), map, products, status, ThisTask, and update_distmap().

◆ send_data_back()

int send_data_back ( int  target)

Definition at line 839 of file distribute.c.

840{
841 /* This routine sends the content of a box to a target task.
842 Communication is divided in these stages:
843 1) the sender communicates the start and length of its box,
844 2) the sender receives the start and the length of the needed box,
845 3) intersection of the sender and target boxes is computed
846 4) if there is an intersection the sender receives a map of needed particles
847 5) the sender loops on particles and sends them in chunks of size BUFLEN
848 */
849
850 int ibox, jbox, kbox, good_particle;
851 int recv_box[6];
852 MPI_Status status;
853
854 MPI_Recv(recv_box, 6, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
855
856 int bufcount=0;
857 int sent=0;
858
859 /* find particles that are wanted by the receiver */
860 for (int iz=0; iz<subbox.Nstored; iz++)
861 {
862#ifdef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
863 INDEX_TO_COORD(iz,ibox,jbox,kbox,subbox.Lgwbl);
864#else
865 INDEX_TO_COORD(frag_pos[iz],ibox,jbox,kbox,subbox.Lgwbl);
866#endif
867 good_particle = ( ibox>=subbox.safe[_x_] && ibox<subbox.Lgwbl[_x_]-subbox.safe[_x_] &&
868 jbox>=subbox.safe[_y_] && jbox<subbox.Lgwbl[_y_]-subbox.safe[_y_] &&
869 kbox>=subbox.safe[_z_] && kbox<subbox.Lgwbl[_z_]-subbox.safe[_z_] );
870
871 /* global box frame */
872 ibox = (ibox + subbox.stabl[_x_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_];
873 jbox = (jbox + subbox.stabl[_y_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_];
874 kbox = (kbox + subbox.stabl[_z_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_];
875
876 if (good_particle &&
877 ibox >= recv_box[0] && ibox < recv_box[0]+recv_box[3] &&
878 jbox >= recv_box[1] && jbox < recv_box[1]+recv_box[4] &&
879 kbox >= recv_box[2] && kbox < recv_box[2]+recv_box[5])
880 {
881 /* position in the fft domain */
882 back_buffer[bufcount].pos = COORD_TO_INDEX(ibox - recv_box[0], jbox - recv_box[1], kbox - recv_box[2], (recv_box+3));
883 back_buffer[bufcount].zacc = frag[iz].zacc;
884 back_buffer[bufcount].group_ID =frag[iz].group_ID;
885
886 ++bufcount;
887 ++sent;
888
889 if (bufcount==BUFLEN)
890 {
891 MPI_Send(&bufcount, 1, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
892 MPI_Send(back_buffer, bufcount * sizeof(back_data), MPI_BYTE, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
893 bufcount=0;
894 }
895 }
896 }
897
898 if (bufcount)
899 {
900 MPI_Send(&bufcount, 1, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
901 MPI_Send(back_buffer, bufcount * sizeof(back_data), MPI_BYTE, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
902 }
903
904 bufcount=0;
905 MPI_Send(&bufcount, 1, MPI_INT, target, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
906
907 /* done */
908 return 0;
909}

References _x_, _y_, _z_, back_buffer, BUFLEN, COORD_TO_INDEX, frag, frag_pos, good_particle, back_data::group_ID, product_data::group_ID, grid_data::GSglobal, INDEX_TO_COORD, subbox_data::Lgwbl, MyGrids, subbox_data::Nstored, back_data::pos, subbox_data::safe, subbox_data::stabl, status, subbox, back_data::zacc, and product_data::zacc.

◆ set_distmap_bit()

void set_distmap_bit ( unsigned int *  map,
unsigned int  pos,
int  value 
)

Definition at line 658 of file distribute.c.

659{
660 /* this operates on the map allocated for the distribution */
661 /* sets to 1 the bit corresponding to position pos */
662 if (value)
663 map[pos/UINTLEN] |= (1<<pos%UINTLEN);
664 else
665 map[pos/UINTLEN] &= ~(1<<pos%UINTLEN);
666
667}

◆ subbox_space_index()

unsigned int subbox_space_index ( unsigned int  pos,
int *  box 
)

Definition at line 627 of file distribute.c.

628{
629 /* here we go
630 (1) from index pos to relative position in intersection,
631 (2) from that to global position, imposing PBCs,
632 (3) then we compute the position in the local subbox, imposing PBCs again,
633 (4) and finally the index */
634
635 unsigned int ip, jp, kp;
636
637 INDEX_TO_COORD(pos, ip, jp, kp, (box+3)); /* coords within the intersection */
638
639 return
640 COORD_TO_INDEX(((ip + box[_x_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_] - subbox.stabl[_x_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_],
641 ((jp + box[_y_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_] - subbox.stabl[_y_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_],
642 ((kp + box[_z_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_] - subbox.stabl[_z_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_])%MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_],
643 subbox.Lgwbl);
644
645}

References _x_, _y_, _z_, COORD_TO_INDEX, grid_data::GSglobal, INDEX_TO_COORD, subbox_data::Lgwbl, MyGrids, subbox_data::stabl, and subbox.

void update_distmap ( unsigned int *  map,
int *  box 
)

Definition at line 685 of file distribute.c.

686{
687
688 unsigned int size = box[3] * box[4] * box[5];
689 unsigned int bit, i;
690
691 for (i=0; i< size; i++)
692 {
693
694 bit=get_distmap_bit(map, i);
